## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] object. If there is an explicit designated requirement, then it’s included in this data blob.

Specify the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCSRequirementInformation] flag when calling the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopySigningInformation(_:_:_:)] function to get this information.

# kSecCodeInfoRequirementData

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is the internal requirements of the code as a binary blob.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCodeInfoRequirementData: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] object. If there is an explicit designated requirement, then it’s included in this data blob.

Specify the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCSRequirementInformation] flag when calling the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopySigningInformation(_:_:_:)] function to get this information.
title: kSecCodeInfoRequirementData
